fields.label: Component
fields.description: The repository, package, release, dependency, or operational control being reviewed.

fields.label: Control Signal
fields.description: The observed signal, such as an attestation, release signature, manifest, advisory, policy, or maintenance event.

fields.label: Source Locator
fields.description: A stable retrieval note, URL, release identifier, commit, advisory ID, or artifact locator.

fields.label: Review Boundary
fields.description: The exact version, release, time window, dependency set, or repository scope where the observation applies.

fields.label: Risk Interpretation
fields.description: A bounded explanation of what risk or assurance the observation does and does not support.

fields.label: Limitations
fields.description: Constraints that prevent overclaiming operational assurance or security posture.
